data.title: Freebirds Is Stuffing More Than Burritos This Summer: Back-to-School Supply Drive is Underway
data.description: Freebirds World Burrito in Dallas is hosting their annual Back-to-School Supply Drive at all locations until August 7. Guests are encouraged to donate new school supplies, with all contributions benefiting local schools. Those who donate will receive a special thank you gift. This initiative aims to support students in need and ensure they are prepared for the upcoming school year. Join Freebirds in making a difference in the community by participating in this meaningful campaign.

data.title: Twenty West Media Named Official Media Partner of the Americas Food & Beverage Show 30th Anniversary
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, Twenty West Media, a digital marketing agency catering to businesses in North America, has been appointed as an Official Media Partner of the Americas Food & Beverage Show & Conference (AF&B Show), a key B2B trade event for the global food and beverage sector. This partnership aligns with the show's 30th Anniversary edition scheduled for September 14–16, 2026, at the Miami Beach Convention Center. The AF&B Show is presented by the World Trade Ce.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Announces LYTENAVA™ FDA Approval as the First and Only FDA-Approved Ophthalmic Bevacizumab for the Treatment of Wet AMD
data.description: FDA has recently granted approval for an ophthalmic Bevacizumab designed for the eye, marking a significant advancement in retina care. This specialized product has undergone extensive clinical and regulatory assessments over the years. The approval has opened new possibilities for patients and physicians.

data.title: NorthEast Community Bancorp, Inc. announces financial results for Q2 2026, covering the period ending June 30.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the company's revenue for the last quarter increased by 15% compared to the same period last year, reaching a total of $1.2 billion. This growth was attributed to a surge in sales of their latest product, which saw a 25% increase in demand. Additionally, the company reported a net profit of $150 million, marking a significant improvement from the previous year. Officials also mentioned that they plan to invest $100 million in new technologies to further boost their market presence.

data.title: Phoenix Children's Foundation Halves Its Prospecting Time with ZoomInfo
data.description: In Vancouver, ZoomInfo (GTM) announced that Phoenix Children's Foundation, associated with a highly acclaimed pediatric hospital, reduced its average prospecting time by 50% and secured new donations from fresh partners after implementing ZoomInfo. Launching in 1983 with 124 beds, Phoenix Children's now offers services in over 75 pediatric subspecialties. This success was achieved within two quarters of utilizing ZoomInfo's AI GTM platform.
